form.label: Smartbus Operations
form.description: Smartbus SQS/S3 health, throughput, DLQ, and parser-error dashboard.

search.query: index=_internal source=*metrics.log group=smartbus earliest=$time.earliest$ latest=$time.latest$ (queue_name="$queue$" OR remoteQueueName="$queue$") | stats sum(successful_message_count) as successful_messages | fillnull value=0 successful_messages

index=_internal source=*metrics.log group=smartbus earliest=$time.earliest$ latest=$time.latest$ (queue_name="$queue$" OR remoteQueueName="$queue$") | stats sum(failed_message_count) as failed_messages | fillnull value=0 failed_messages

index=_internal source=*metrics.log group=smartbus earliest=$time.earliest$ latest=$time.latest$ (queue_name="$queue$" OR remoteQueueName="$queue$") | stats sum(event_count) as events | fillnull value=0 events
index=_internal source=*splunkd.log* earliest=$time.earliest$ latest=$time.latest$ component=SQSSmartbusInputWorker "Successfully sent a SQS DLQ message to S3" | stats count as dlq_events

index=_internal source=*metrics.log group=smartbus series=message_thruput earliest=$time.earliest$ latest=$time.latest$ (queue_name="$queue$" OR remoteQueueName="$queue$") | timechart span=1m sum(successful_message_count) as successful_messages sum(failed_message_count) as failed_messages sum(event_count) as events by name

index=_internal source=*metrics.log group=smartbus name=ingestor earliest=$time.earliest$ latest=$time.latest$ (queue_name="$queue$" OR remoteQueueName="$queue$") | stats sum(successful_message_count) as successful_messages sum(failed_message_count) as failed_messages sum(event_count) as events sum(raw_size_bytes) as raw_bytes sum(encoded_size_bytes) as encoded_bytes sum(upload_size_bytes) as upload_bytes avg(total_time_ms) as avg_total_ms avg(encoding_time_ms) as avg_encoding_ms avg(upload_time_ms) as avg_upload_ms by series queue_name queue_type upload_type upload_service splunk_server | sort series splunk_server

index=_internal source=*metrics.log group=smartbus name=indexer earliest=$time.earliest$ latest=$time.latest$ (queue_name="$queue$" OR remoteQueueName="$queue$") | stats sum(successful_message_count) as successful_messages sum(failed_message_count) as failed_messages sum(event_count) as events sum(raw_size_bytes) as raw_bytes sum(decode_size_bytes) as decode_bytes avg(total_time_ms) as avg_total_ms avg(queue_time_ms) as avg_queue_ms avg(decoding_time_ms) as avg_decoding_ms avg(bus_time_ms) as avg_bus_ms avg(datastore_time_ms) as avg_datastore_ms avg(indexing_time_ms) as avg_indexing_ms by series queue_name queue_type splunk_server | sort series splunk_server

index=_internal source=*splunkd.log* earliest=$time.earliest$ latest=$time.latest$ ("Successfully finished checking connectivity for remote queue" OR "SQS_GetQueueUrlTransaction" OR "remoteQueue=$queue$" OR "remote queue=$queue$") | rex field=_raw "remote queue=(?<remote_queue>[^\.\s]+)" | rex field=_raw "remoteQueue=(?<remote_queue2>[^\s]+)" | eval queue=coalesce(remote_queue, remote_queue2) | table _time splunk_server component log_level queue message | sort - _time

index=_internal source=*splunkd.log* earliest=$time.earliest$ latest=$time.latest$ (SQSSmartbusOutputWorker OR RemoteQueueOutputWorker OR SmartbusOutputMetrics) ("Sending event data to object_uri" OR "Sending storage-reference-message" OR "SendMessageTimeout tick" OR "registerWithMetricsManager") | table _time splunk_server component log_level message | sort - _time

index=_internal source=*splunkd.log* earliest=$time.earliest$ latest=$time.latest$ (SQSSmartbusInputWorker OR RemoteQueueInputWorker) ("Peeked messages" OR "Received event reference from SQS" OR "Finished downloading object" OR "Parsing pdata done" OR "Accounted for committed events" OR "Attempting to delete message") | table _time splunk_server component log_level message | sort - _time

index=_internal source=*splunkd.log* component=SQSSmartbusInputWorker earliest=$time.earliest$ latest=$time.latest$ "Successfully sent a SQS DLQ message to S3" | timechart span=5m count as dlq_messages by splunk_server

index=_internal source=*splunkd.log* component=SQSSmartbusInputWorker earliest=$time.earliest$ latest=$time.latest$ "Successfully sent a SQS DLQ message to S3" | rex field=_raw "location=(?<dlq_location>\S+)" | rex field=_raw "message_id=(?<message_id>\S+)" | rex field=_raw "size=(?<message_size>\d+)" | rex field=_raw "message_type=(?<message_type>.*)$" | table _time splunk_server dlq_location message_id message_size message_type message | sort - _time

index=_internal source=*splunkd.log* component=SQSSmartbusInputWorker earliest=$time.earliest$ latest=$time.latest$ "Invalid payload_size=" | rex field=_raw "message_id=(?<message_id>\S+)" | rex field=_raw "Invalid payload_size=(?<payload_size>\d+)" | rex field=_raw "bytesRemaining=(?<bytes_remaining>\d+)" | stats count latest(_time) as latest values(payload_size) as payload_size values(bytes_remaining) as bytes_remaining by splunk_server message_id | convert ctime(latest) | sort - latest

index=_internal source=*splunkd.log* component=SQSSmartbusInputWorker earliest=$time.earliest$ latest=$time.latest$ "Cannot register new_channel=" | rex field=_raw "new_channel=\"source::(?<source>[^|]+)\|host::(?<host>[^|]+)\|sourcetype::(?<sourcetype>[^|]+)\|" | stats count latest(_time) as latest by splunk_server source host sourcetype | convert ctime(latest) | sort - count

index=_internal source=*splunkd.log* earliest=$time.earliest$ latest=$time.latest$ "Too many fields. fieldCount=" | rex field=_raw "fieldCount=(?<fieldCount>\d+).*source::(?<source>[^|]+)\|host::(?<host>[^|]+)\|sourcetype::(?<sourcetype>[^|]+)" | stats count max(fieldCount) as max_fieldCount latest(_time) as latest by splunk_server host source sourcetype | convert ctime(latest) | sort - max_fieldCount

index=_internal source=*splunkd.log* component=SQSSmartbusBlobTracking earliest=$time.earliest$ latest=$time.latest$ "Sent event data to object_uri=" raw_size>67108864 | rex field=_raw "object_uri=(?<object_uri>\S+)" | rex field=_raw "event_count=(?<event_count>\d+)" | rex field=_raw "raw_size=(?<raw_size>\d+)" | eval raw_size_mb=round(raw_size/1024/1024,2) | table _time splunk_server object_uri event_count raw_size_mb message | sort - raw_size_mb

index=_internal source=*splunkd.log* earliest=$time.earliest$ latest=$time.latest$ (SQSSmartbusInputWorker OR SQSSmartbusOutputWorker OR RemoteQueueInputWorker OR RemoteQueueOutputWorker OR SQS_Common OR SQS_InputQueue OR SQS_OutputQueue) (ERROR OR WARN OR failed OR exception OR timeout OR denied OR DLQ OR "dead letter") | table _time splunk_server component log_level message | sort - _time
